# Beets & Co

> Branding and marketing agency in South East Melbourne for trades, operators, manufacturers and dealers.

Beets & Co is a South East Melbourne marketing agency (based in Bayside) founded by Michael Beets. We build brands, websites, marketing, video and AI systems for trade businesses across South East Melbourne and Greater Melbourne — so their phone actually rings.

## Services

- Branding & Identity — logos, brand systems, positioning
- Web Design & SEO — fast, conversion-first websites with local SEO built in
- Marketing & Growth — campaigns, content, Google Business Profile
- AI Chatbots & Automation — lead capture and follow-up systems
- Video & Content — shoots, reels, case study videos
- Retainer & Ongoing Support — monthly senior-level support

## Contact

- Website: https://beetsandco.com.au
- Email: hello@beetsandco.com.au
- Phone: +61 447 542 930
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/beetsandco
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/beetsandco

## Service Area

South East Melbourne and Greater Melbourne, VIC, Australia — including Bayside, Cheltenham, Frankston, Mordialloc, Chelsea, Edithvale, Aspendale, Dandenong, Campbellfield, Sunshine, Laverton, Thomastown, Epping, Cranbourne and surrounding suburbs.
